name: YourCause (Blackbaud) CSRconnect API
what_it_does: YourCause (Blackbaud) CSRconnect REST API for corporate social responsibility, employee giving, volunteering, and grants management. Enables AI agents to manage employee charitable giving and payroll deduction for corporate giving program automation, handle volunteer opportunity management and time logging for employee engagement, access grants management and foundation giving for corporate philanthropy workflow, retrieve nonprofit eligibility verification for giving program compliance, manage giving campaign and matching gift processing for corporate matching programs, handle impact reporting and ESG metrics for sustainability disclosure, access integration with Blackbaud's nonprofit ecosystem (RENXT, eTapestry) for corporate-nonprofit data sharing, retrieve employee engagement analytics for CSR program performance, manage global giving and multi-currency donation processing for international programs, and integrate YourCause data with HRIS, payroll, and ESG platforms.
use_cases: Processing donation matching from corporate giving agents
Managing volunteer programs from employee engagement agents
Reporting ESG metrics from sustainability reporting agents
Administering corporate grants from philanthropy agents
not_for: Small businesses without formal corporate giving programs
Individual donors without employer matching context
best_when: A Fortune 500 corporation using YourCause (Blackbaud) wants AI agents to automate employee giving, matching gift processing, volunteer management, grants administration, and ESG impact reporting.
avoid_when: BLACKBAUD DATA BREACH LEGACY: Blackbaud suffered a major 2020 data breach affecting 13,000+ nonprofits and their donors — verify current security posture and SOC 2 attestation before integrating employee and donation data. OFAC sanctions compliance — automated donation disbursement must screen recipient nonprofits; donations to sanctioned organizations create federal compliance violations. Corporate governance — automated grant approval above delegation thresholds requires board/committee review; automated bypass creates fiduciary governance issues.

auth.notes: YourCause uses OAuth 2.0 via Blackbaud SKY API. REST API with JSON. Dallas, Texas HQ (YourCause). Blackbaud acquired YourCause (2019). Blackbaud (BLKB NASDAQ). YourCause founded 2008. CSRconnect is the enterprise corporate giving platform. 300+ Fortune 500 customers. Competes with Benevity and Bright Funds for corporate CSR. Blackbaud 2020 data breach legacy warrants current security verification.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Dallas, TX. Blackbaud (BLKB NASDAQ) acquired YourCause 2019. Founded 2008. 300+ Fortune 500 customers. Corporate CSR platform. Competes with Benevity for corporate giving.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; SKY API limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: BLACKBAUD 2020 DATA BREACH: Blackbaud (parent company) suffered major 2020 data breach affecting 13,000+ nonprofits; verify current security posture, SOC 2 Type II attestation, and security controls before integrating employee giving and donation data

OFAC sanctions screening — automated donation disbursement to nonprofits must include OFAC SDN list screening; donations to sanctioned organizations create federal compliance violations for the corporate donor

IRS 501(c)(3) verification — automated matching gift processing requires current IRS nonprofit status verification; matching donations to organizations with revoked status creates corporate tax deductibility risk
Payroll deduction compliance — automated payroll deduction for charitable giving must comply with state wage payment laws; unauthorized payroll deductions create state labor law violations
ESG reporting accuracy — YourCause data feeds corporate ESG/sustainability reports; automated data errors in giving metrics create SEC ESG disclosure inaccuracy risk for public companies
Blackbaud SKY API coupling — YourCause API routes through Blackbaud SKY API infrastructure; SKY API availability and rate limits affect YourCause operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate CSR and giving. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2/SKY API. US. Employee giving and donation data. Blackbaud 2020 breach history.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate CSR. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Employee giving and donation data. 2020 breach context.
